Name: DSP2-200
Description: Foundation Series - DSP2-200: 2-channel 200W @4? amplifier. Bridgeable to 1x360W @8? mono. Min impedance: 4? (normal), 8? (bridged). Preset DSP EQ curves for Origin Acoustics speakers. RCA + Optical inputs (one active at a time, both with pass-through). Speaker output via Phoenix block connector. Sub Out (RCA). 12-14g wire recommended. Half-rack / 1U with ears.
Channels: 2 x Lo-Z (L/R); bridgeable to 1 x mono
Inputs: 1 x RCA Unbalanced (w/ pass-through); 1 x Optical (w/ pass-through)
Outputs: 1 x Speaker Phoenix Connector (stereo); 1 x Sub Out RCA

Name: DSP3-150
Description: Foundation Series - DSP3-150: 3-channel amplifier. L/R: 150W @ 4? each. Sub: 300W @ 4?. Min impedance: 4?. No 70V support. Preset DSP EQ curves for Origin Acoustics speakers. Inputs: 2x RCA A/B (unbalanced) + 1x Optical. Outputs: 2x RCA A/B pass-through. Speaker outputs via terminal blocks. Wire guide: 16g ?100ft, 14g 50-150ft, 12g >100ft. 2U rack mount.
Inputs: 2 x RCA A/B Unbalanced; 1 x Optical
Outputs: 2 x RCA A/B Unbalanced (pass-through); 3 x Speaker terminals

Name: DSP60.8
Description: Foundation Series - DSP60.8: 8-channel 1RU amplifier with mixed Lo-Z and Hi-Z outputs. 8x Lo-Z @ 60W (4/8?) + 4x Hi-Z @ 125W (70V). AutoShare up to 125W/ch within Ch1-4 and Ch5-8 groups. Total system power: 500W. Inputs: 4x RCA unbalanced, 2x balanced XLR (Ch1/Ch2 mic-capable, sensitivity via web app), S/PDIF in/out, RJ45 network, Wi-Fi, GPIO wall control, IEC power. Full DSP via Origin Acoustics web app. Crestron/Control4/Q-Sys compatible. Master/Slave via S/PDIF. ERP/Energy Star/UL listed. 1RU full rack.
Channels: 8 x Lo-Z / 4 x Hi-Z; no bridge mode
Powersharing (up to): 4 x 125W AutoShare (within Ch1-4 and Ch5-8 groups independently)
Inputs: 4 x RCA Unbalanced; 2 x Balanced XLR (Ch1/Ch2 mic-capable); S/PDIF; RJ45 Network; Wi-Fi; GPIO wall control
Outputs: 8 x Lo-Z Speaker terminals; 4 x Hi-Z Speaker terminals; S/PDIF out
